name: io.github.douglasgan/asktian
description: Chinese metaphysics (bazi, qimen, 5-element) as decision-support tools for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: ASKTIAN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OPTIONAL. Leave blank for free local-fallback mode (works instantly, approximate). For real, full-accuracy readings, set a key from https://api.asktian.com — note: the key runs on TIAN Points, so it needs a funded balance (top up at https://wallet.asktian.com).
